content.answer:
Hi Ian,

Attached please find the business update for SCS, Lovito, and warehouse for
our discussion tomorrow. Thank you!

Best,
Jinyu

content.question:
Thanks.



Slide 6

   - The MOM drop is quite concerning given that we still have platform
   boost. We should be growing
   - How does July look like?
- Our ABS also dropped?

Slide 9

   - What does VMI mean here?
- How does the JIT performance compare vs New CSPUs?

Seems like not very
   food
   - Can remind me how we are selecting for JIT products again?

Slide 10 – 11

   - Would we be operating their brand stores?

Or will they be placing
   their products inside Choice store?

Slide 12

   - How big is the brands business in Temu right now?
- It is mostly half consignment right?
And pricing is set by brands?
- What does POP mean?
- Out of the 3 type of brands here, which is the most successful?

Slide 13

   - How does AE do this?
What do they do?
What does the brands do?

- How out the 3 type of brands here, which has been the most successful
   in this model?

Slide 16

   - We will probably be able to benefit from platform incentive program as
   well?

Slide 21

   - So what exactly is our new operating hours now?

It is not clear to me



Slide 24

   - Do not quite understand #4, are we taking into account what SLS is
   really charging us?

Slide 25

   - Why do we not put much more in TH Local WH?
- For VN, what is the comms between NN and Anbo right now?

NN has
   benefits in terms of faster BWT right?
- For TH, what is the advantages of putting so much in NNWH?

Slide 28

   - Where does the JIT fall within here?

Feels like JIT performance is
   quite bad comparatively?
- Do we have results of the Not in SPU when it becomes an old SKU?

How
   is the performance compared with SKUs in CSPU?

Slide 32 – 37

   - I remember we wanted to improve the listing quality overall. How do I
   understand what we will fix first, and the SKU coverage over time?

Slide 46 – 47

   - Can discuss in meeting, not sure I understand this very well



Slide 48

   - Our contribution from AMS is going down?
Paid ads too?

Slide 51

   - Have we heard back from legal yet on IP issues



Slide 52

   - How are we dealing with Shop CS operating hours?
Similar to SCS?

Slide 67

   - So these are typically MT/LT sellers?
- How has this improved BWT overall for these sellers?
- What does #4 and #5 mean?
We pitch them Anbo and LFF together or?

Slide 68

   - So 2k sellers have registered but we are only serving 50 right now?
Why so little?

- Can remind me what are the numbers we are looking at for this business
   in the months ahead?

Slide 69

   - What is this about?

Not clear to me



Slide 70

   - Not sure we can do this ba..







*From:* Ian Ho <hoi@sea.com>
*Sent:* Thursday, 26 June 2025 8:55 am
*To:* 'Jinyu Du' <jinyu.du@shopee.com>
*Cc:* 'Ning Li' <ning.li@shopee.com>; 'Larry Lin' <larry.lin@shopee.com>;
'Chengchen Huo' <chengchen.huo@shopee.com>; 'Florence Zhai' <
florence.zhai@shopee.com>; 'Roger Yao' <roger.yao@shopee.com>; 'Jessie
Zhang' <mengqi.zhang@shopee.com>; 'Jiang Hans' <hans.jiang@shopee.com>;
'Mengxiao Yu' <william.yu@shopee.com>; 'Ran Yang' <russell.yang@shopee.com>;
'Ang Li' <ang.lee@shopee.com>; 'Fan Fan' <jacob.fan01@shopee.com>; 'Roy Lv'
<roy.lv@shopee.com>; 'Lu Lin' <lu.lin@shopee.com>; 'Charissa Li' <
charissa.li@shopee.com>; 'Siqin Liu' <siqin.liu@lovito.com>; 'Weijia Song' <
vega.song@shopee.com>; 'Shuning Wang' <shuning.wang@shopee.com>; 'Rainy
Kong' <rainy.kong@shopee.com>; Jiahui Ren <renjh@sea.com>; 'Xingguo Liu' <
kala.liu@shopee.com>; 'Bai L' <bai.l@shopee.com>
*Subject:* RE: [Pre-read] SCS & Lovito & Warehouse bi-weekly
update_2025.06.26



Thanks.



Slide 6

   - The MOM drop is quite concerning given that we still have platform
   boost. We should be growing
   - How does July look like?
- Our ABS also dropped?

Slide 9

   - What does VMI mean here?
- How does the JIT performance compare vs New CSPUs?

Seems like not very
   food
   - Can remind me how we are selecting for JIT products again?

Slide 10 – 11

   - Would we be operating their brand stores?

Or will they be placing
   their products inside Choice store?

Slide 12

   - How big is the brands business in Temu right now?
- It is mostly half consignment right?
And pricing is set by brands?
- What does POP mean?
- Out of the 3 type of brands here, which is the most successful?

Slide 13

   - How does AE do this?
What do they do?
What does the brands do?

- How out the 3 type of brands here, which has been the most successful
   in this model?

Slide 16

   - We will probably be able to benefit from platform incentive program as
   well?

Slide 21

   - So what exactly is our new operating hours now?

It is not clear to me



Slide 24

   - Do not quite understand #4, are we taking into account what SLS is
   really charging us?

Slide 25

   - Why do we not put much more in TH Local WH?
- For VN, what is the comms between NN and Anbo right now?

NN has
   benefits in terms of faster BWT right?
- For TH, what is the advantages of putting so much in NNWH?

Slide 28

   - Where does the JIT fall within here?

Feels like JIT performance is
   quite bad comparatively?
- Do we have results of the Not in SPU when it becomes an old SKU?

How
   is the performance compared with SKUs in CSPU?

Slide 32 – 37

   - I remember we wanted to improve the listing quality overall. How do I
   understand what we will fix first, and the SKU coverage over time?
